creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bapt
Date: Sat Jul 28 12:02:12 2012
New Revision: 301650
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301650

Log:
  - update to 0.17.0
  
  PR:		ports/168705
  Submitted by:	sunpoet

Modified:
  head/devel/libgit2/Makefile
  head/devel/libgit2/distinfo
  head/devel/libgit2/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/libgit2/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/libgit2/Makefile	Sat Jul 28 11:57:19 2012	(r301649)
+++ head/devel/libgit2/Makefile	Sat Jul 28 12:02:12 2012	(r301650)
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	libgit2
-PORTVERSION=	0.16.0
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.17.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://cloud.github.com/downloads/libgit2/libgit2/
 
@@ -16,11 +15,14 @@ COMMENT=	Portable, pure C implementation
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
-USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 USE_CMAKE=	yes
+USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
+USE_PYTHON_BUILD=	yes
 
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
+PLIST_SUB=	SHLIB_VER=${PORTVERSION}
+
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 .if ${ARCH} == "sparc64"

==============================================================================
--- head/devel/libgit2/distinfo	Sat Jul 28 11:57:19 2012	(r301649)
+++ head/devel/libgit2/distinfo	Sat Jul 28 12:02:12 2012	(r301650)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

+SHA256 (libgit2-0.17.0.tar.gz) = 068eed0b8fe852a7cc55aae46d2299e9c9e3e00badc1c293d72a9dd122226018
+SIZE (libgit2-0.17.0.tar.gz) = 2096159

-lib/libgit2.so.0.16.0
